name: Relaxing Getaway
description: Tryesse Pro combines softness and performance. This innovative yarn system produces broadloom carpet that is a great addition to new constructions and condominium projects, thanks to its texture and cozy colour range.

name: EverStrand | Stylish Tones
description: High-quality PET fibre made with recycled bottles using the patented Continuum process, helping to keep plastic waste out of landfills. Quick and easy cleanup with inherently stain-resistant fibre plus EasyClean spill and soil protection. Available in a wide range of patterns and colors to complement any style and space.

name: Ideal Texture Collection | Oak-Emory
description: The Ideal Wood Hardwood Ideal Texture collection is a series of engineered oak flooring known for its wide-plank aesthetic and wire-brushed finish. name: Aquafix | Royal Series | Louis

name: Lericy Marble
description: Simply Stone Tile by Nature's Impression is a premium stone core flooring designed by nature. Featuring ultra realistic high definition digital imaging and stone embossing surface finish to authentically create stunning marble stone visuals. Simply Stone is built on a stone core and backed with a 10x IXPE attached underpad for superior dimensional stability and comfort.
